Case# SFContentBlockerErrorCode.loadingInterrupted

iOS 9.0–10.0DeprecatediPadOS 9.0–10.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.4–13.4Deprecated

```
case loadingInterrupted
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/safariservices/sfcontentblockererrorcode/loadinginterrupted#Discussion)

There was an error loading the content blocker extension.
